prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `184a9768`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: detect the large hollow monochrome rectangles, ignore gray `5` noise, and translate every other outside object into the zero regions inside those rectangles without rotating it. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_184a9768/verifier.py#L4) does that as an exact shape-preserving placement search, and the generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_184a9768/generator.py#L56) builds the latent packed-inside structure first, then moves those pieces outside and adds gray singleton noise. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_184a9768/__init__.py), and I added [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_184a9768/notes.md#L1) because I used the Opus hint only as a starting point and discarded the Sonnet hint: it describes positional markers, but the examples show actual translated pieces that can combine inside the same zero region. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 184a9768` passed all 4 official examples, `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 184a9768 --n-examples 1000` produced the artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 184a9768` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. I also sanity-checked the generated preview sheet and the family looks right: large hollow containers, scattered source pieces, and sparse gray noise.

Artifacts are here: [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/184a9768/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/184a9768/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/184a9768/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/184a9768/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/184a9768/previews/preview_03.png).
